query:
-- Look at the full ChannelHaus invoice items to understand the pricing structure
-- lineAmount = ex-GST wholesale cost (what ChannelHaus charges SmileTel)
-- unitAmount = ? (need to understand this field)
-- The ChannelHaus invoices are GST-inclusive, so lineAmount = invoice amount / 1.1

-- Check a few specific items to understand the pattern
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.taxAmount,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  -- unitAmount / lineAmount ratio should tell us if unitAmount is GST-inclusive
  ROUND(bi.unitAmount / NULLIF(bi.lineAmount, 0), 4) as ratio
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.invoiceNumber IN ('19007096','19007090','19007093','19007087','19007086','19007066')
ORDER BY bi.invoiceNumber, bi.lineAmount DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Look at the full ChannelHaus invoice items to understand the pricing structure
-- lineAmount = ex-GST wholesale cost (what ChannelHaus charges SmileTel)
-- unitAmount = ? (need to understand this field)
-- The ChannelHaus invoices are GST-inclusive, so lineAmount = invoice amount / 1.1

-- Check a few specific items to understand the pattern
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.contactName,
  bi.description,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.taxAmount,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  -- unitAmount / lineAmount ratio should tell us if unitAmount is GST-inclusive
  ROUND(bi.unitAmount / NULLIF(bi.lineAmount, 0), 4) as ratio
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.invoiceNumber IN ('19007096','19007090','19007093','19007087','19007086','19007066')
ORDER BY bi.invoiceNumber, bi.lineAmount DESC;
